predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_adopted_child_of
predicates.description: The first person is an adopted child of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_descendant_of_adopted_child_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of an adopted child of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_qualifying_issue
predicates.description: The deceased leaves at least one descendant, adopted child, or descendant of an adopted child.

predicates.name: is_part_of_estate_of
predicates.description: The asset forms part of the estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The first person (surviving spouse) acquires the usufruct of the entire estate of the second person (the deceased).
